content:
Hi everyone! 👋

I've been working on GetCareerPilot for the past few months, and I'd genuinely love to get feedback from the developer community.

🔗 Live Demo: https://getcareerpilot.com

GetCareerPilot is an all-in-one career platform that currently includes:

✨ Resume Builder – Create professional, ATS-friendly resumes with an intuitive interface.

📝 Cover Letter Builder – Generate and customize cover letters that complement your resume.

📚 Career Blogs – Articles and guides covering resumes, interviews, career growth, and job search tips.

I'm not sharing this to promote the project—I'm here because I truly value constructive feedback from fellow developers. I know there's always room for improvement, and your experience can help me make this platform much better.

I'd really appreciate your feedback on:

🎨 UI/UX and overall design

⚡ Performance and loading speed

📱 Mobile responsiveness

♿ Accessibility

🧭 User experience and navigation

🐞 Bugs or unexpected behavior

💡 Missing features or ideas you'd like to see

✨ Overall first impression

Please don't hold back. If something feels confusing, looks off, or could be improved, I'd love to hear about it in the comments. Every suggestion will be reviewed carefully, and I'll work on implementing the most valuable improvements.

Thank you so much for taking the time to review my project. Your feedback genuinely means a lot and will help me continue improving GetCareerPilot. ❤️

🔗 Website: https://getcareerpilot.com

📸 Project Preview

Here are a few screenshots showcasing different parts of GetCareerPilot, including the homepage, Resume Builder, Cover Letter Builder, and Career Blogs. These should give you a quick overview of the platform before you explore it yourself.

Feel free to share your first impressions, point out anything that could be improved, or suggest features you'd like to see. Every piece of feedback is greatly appreciated and will help me make GetCareerPilot even better.
